name: Lemon Herb Broiled Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds frying chicken, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler. In a 1-quart saucepan, stir together all ingredients except the chicken.
2. Place the chicken on a greased broiler pan; brush the chicken with the butter mixture. Broil at 6-8 inches from the heat, turning and basting with sauce every 10 minutes until the chicken is fork tender (30-35 minutes).
3. Meanwhile, cook the remaining sauce over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture comes to a full boil (2 to 3 minutes). Just before serving, spoon the sauce over the chicken.
